name: Subject 07 | Black Hole in Action.
description:
SOLDIER POV

|||||Nothing to see here Nothing to see her|||||

MYSTERIOUS AEGIS DOCUMENTS FOUND IN DECEASED JOURNALIST'S APARTMENT

Authorities have confirmed the discovery of several classified documents linked to The Aegis Division inside the apartment of Mr. Daniel Heathcliff, a former investigative journalist found deceased on October 8, 2025. The files — concealed within the interior walls of his residence — are believed to belong to a batch stolen during a breach on July 4, 2025 from an undisclosed Aegis facility.

According to initial reports, portions of the material appear to have been intentionally destroyed, suggesting an attempt to incinerate evidence prior to law enforcement’s arrival.

Officials have declined to comment on the contents or authenticity of the files, citing ongoing federal involvement in the investigation.

Excerpt from an article in The Haven City Tribune, October 15, 2025

Note from editor : the article has never been published.

CLASSIFIED REPORT — LEVEL 5 CLEARANCE REQUIRED

SUBJECT ID: Subject-07

THREAT CLASS (1-10): 8

RISK LEVEL: Catastrophic — Spatial Instability Confirmed

Composite portrait

Subject-07 is a humanoid entity resembling an adult female. The figure appears nude but exhibits no clear biological detail, with smooth, pale skin and elongated limbs. Hair white or silver; eyes emit faint gravitational distortion rather than reflected light. Thermal scans return negative; she absorbs ambient energy, resulting in temperature drops averaging –10°C within ten meters.

First sighted three years ago following a Level-3 Spatial Distortion Event. To date, nine confirmed appearances within urban containment zones. Four direct engagements — all resulted in total unit loss, excluding one survivor.

Observed Abilities

Subject-07 demonstrates control over localized gravitational collapse, generating miniature singularities (“blackhole events”) via manual activation. Range varies from 3–30 meters, capable of consuming matter, energy, and sound. After each event, spatial geometry exhibits structural failure consistent with quantum disintegration.

Secondary abilities include:

  • Instantaneous displacement (vanishing/reappearing without spatial continuity).

  • Cognitive interference (memory loss, sensory distortion, or dissociation
creator: Ark.
